judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue expansion and solid margins, but currently unprofitable and trading at a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate; next earnings 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 33.5% YoY — demonstrates strong market adoption.
Gross margin 73.3% — indicates efficient service delivery.
Free cash flow $755M TTM — positive cash generation supports operations.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $234.18.
negatives: Operating margin -9.7% and Profit margin -3.7% — the company is not yet profitable on an operating or net basis.
Forward P/E 137.89x and Price/Sales 31.92x — valuation is very high, pricing in significant future growth.
Debt/Equity ratio 230.86% — high leverage relative to equity.

news.paragraph: Cloudflare (NET) has no recent headlines to provide immediate context for traders. The stock's price action will likely be driven by its fundamental profile and upcoming earnings report. Investors should monitor analyst sentiment and the company's ability to meet its growth estimates.

examples.body: $NET I have a weird feeling this goes on an $AMD $MU $SNDK type of run very soon…
$NET Sell the news. 194 tomorrow buy the dip.
$NET Cloudflare CEO on AI’s impact on auditing: “We are moving into a system where every business risk is continuously audited. We’re closing the books faster,…
$NET no wonder it moves so stable these days. whales were in but seems that some of them are leaving
